title: Top Commodities by Units Moved
query: SELECT SUM(Count) AS total FROM (SELECT Count FROM MarketBuy WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate UNION ALL SELECT Count FROM MarketSell WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate)
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Type_Localised, Type) AS label, SUM(Count) AS value FROM (SELECT Type_Localised, Type, Count FROM MarketBuy WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate UNION ALL SELECT Type_Localised, Type, Count FROM MarketSell WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate) GROUP BY label ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} total unit(s) traded across all commodities during the report period. The top commodity is the fingerprint of your trade route — Tritium means carrier logistics, LTDs mean mining payoff, Biowaste means something unusual is going on.
details.help: Combines MarketBuy and MarketSell counts via UNION ALL for a total units-moved figure. Type_Localised is the human-readable commodity name.

tagLines: Commodity flow data compiled. The relevant trading exchanges acknowledge the volume.
Every ton on this chart is a route flown, a dock queued, and a market judged correctly. Or not.
The galaxy's economy runs on tonnage. This is your contribution to keeping the lights on.
